quarantine.oracle: When tabix_path is provided without path, the reader must raise ValueError

evidence.quote: reader.py:64-65: if tabix_path and not path: raise ValueError

quarantine.oracle: After permuting ALT alleles and remapping all dependent fields (Number=A/R fields, GT), the variant semantics are preserved

evidence.quote: ALT permutation with coordinated remapping of Number=A/R fields and GT genotypes

quarantine.oracle: Permuting sample column order preserves all genotype and format data per sample

evidence.quote: Sample column permutation preserves per-sample genotype data integrity

quarantine.oracle: Shuffling meta-information lines (except fileformat) preserves the parsed header dictionary content

evidence.quote: Meta-information line order is not semantically meaningful per VCF spec

quarantine.oracle: Shuffling key-value order in INFO fields preserves all parsed INFO values

evidence.quote: INFO field key-value order is not semantically meaningful

quarantine.oracle: Converting VCF to BCF and back preserves all record data

evidence.quote: BCF is a binary encoding of VCF; roundtrip should be lossless

quarantine.oracle: Splitting multi-allelic records into biallelic records preserves all allele information and genotype assignments

evidence.quote: Multi-allelic splitting decomposes records while preserving variant semantics

quarantine.oracle: Left-aligning indels preserves the variant allele sequence and semantics

evidence.quote: Left-alignment normalizes indel representation without changing variant meaning

quarantine.oracle: Trimming common prefix/suffix from REF and ALT preserves the variant allele sequences

evidence.quote: Common affix trimming is a normalization that preserves variant semantics

quarantine.oracle: Both original and transformed VCF should be rejected (or both accepted) — the parser must consistently reject a VCF whose first line is not ##fileformat=VCFv4...

evidence.quote: The first line of a VCF file must be ##fileformat=VCFv4.5

quarantine.oracle: Both original and transformed VCF should be rejected (or both accepted) — the parser must consistently reject records with GT allele indices exceeding the number of ALT alleles

evidence.quote: GT: Genotype, encoded as allele values separated by / or |. The allelic values are 0 for the reference allele, 1 for the first ALT allele, 2 for the second ALT allele, etc.

quarantine.oracle: Both original and transformed VCF should be rejected (or both accepted) — the parser must consistently reject records missing required fixed columns (CHROM, POS, ID, REF, ALT, QUAL, FILTER, INFO)

evidence.quote: Each VCF record must contain the following fixed fields: CHROM, POS, ID, REF, ALT, QUAL, FILTER, INFO

quarantine.oracle: Both original and transformed VCF should be rejected (or both accepted) — converting VCF to BCF and back should preserve rejection status

evidence.quote: BCF is a binary representation of VCF

quarantine.oracle: The header dictionary entries are identical in content after permutation

evidence.quote: Header dictionary order is not semantically meaningful

quarantine.oracle: The set of CSQ annotations per record is identical after sorting

evidence.quote: CSQ annotation order within a record is not semantically meaningful

quarantine.oracle: The set of structured key-value pairs per record is identical after sorting

evidence.quote: Structured key-value order is not semantically meaningful

quarantine.oracle: All records are identical after write-then-read roundtrip

evidence.quote: A compliant VCF writer must produce output that re-parses identically

quarantine.oracle: Query methods isStructural, getNAlleles, isBiallelic return identical values before and after roundtrip

evidence.quote: Parsing and re-serializing a VCF record must preserve its structural properties

quarantine.oracle: The variant interpretation is identical after injecting equivalent missing values (./. vs .)

evidence.quote: Missing values have multiple textual representations that are semantically equivalent

quarantine.oracle: The parser raises an error when INFO fields with Number=A have incorrect cardinality relative to ALT alleles

evidence.quote: INFO fields with Number=A must have one value per ALT allele
